headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks on Our Buy List and 1 We Avoid
summary: Large-cap stocks are known for their staying power and ability to weather market storms better than smaller competitors. However, their sheer size makes it more challenging to maintain high growth rates as they’ve already captured significant portions of their markets.

raw.headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks on Our Buy List and 1 We Avoid
raw.summary: Large-cap stocks are known for their staying power and ability to weather market storms better than smaller competitors. However, their sheer size makes it more challenging to maintain high growth rates as they’ve already captured significant portions of their markets.

headline: 3 Dividend Stocks To Consider With Yields Up To 11.2%
summary: The United States market has shown impressive performance, rising 3.4% over the last week and 35% over the past year, with earnings projected to grow by 16% annually. In such a robust environment, dividend stocks can offer investors a compelling combination of income and potential capital appreciation, making them an attractive consideration for those seeking stability and returns.

headline: ADP Recognizes 2026 HCM Distinction Award Winners at 41st Annual Meeting of the Minds Conference
summary: At its 41st annual ADP Meeting of the Minds conference, ADP announced the winners of the 2026 HCM Distinction Awards, recognizing five organizations — Northwood Investors, Thrive Restaurant Group, Four Seasons, LRS, and Charter Schools USA — that are setting a new standard for how companies support their people while driving business performance. These leaders are leveraging integrated HCM solutions to create more connected, engaged and innovative workplaces.

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Weigh In On 3 Industrials Stocks With Over 3% Dividend Yields
summary: During times of market turbulence, investors look to dividend-yielding stocks from companies with high cash flows. Benzinga's analysts have the latest ratings. WSO: 3.17%, KFY: 3.42%, ADP: 3.45%.
